heading: Eligibility of certain dependents for enrollment in domestic dependent elementary and secondary schools
label: 2164b Eligibility of certain dependents for enrollment in domestic dependent elementary and secondary schools

children.heading: .—Program Authorized
children.label: a .—Program Authorized
children.text: Beginning not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2025, the Secretary of Defense shall carry out a program under which a dependent of a full-time, active-duty member of the armed forces may enroll in a covered DODEA school at the military installation to which the member is assigned, on a space-available basis as described in subsection (b), without regard to whether the member resides on the installation as described in .section 2164(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: .—Enrollment on Space-available Basis
children.label: b .—Enrollment on Space-available Basis
children.text: A student participating in the program under subsection (a) may be enrolled in a covered DODEA school only if the school has the capacity to accept the student, as determined by the Director of the Department of Defense Education Activity.
the readiness needs of the Secretary of the military department concerned; and
the capacity of the covered DODEA schools located at the installation to accept additional students, as determined by the Director.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Not later than , and annually thereafter for four years, the Secretary shall brief the Committees on Armed Services of the Senate and House of Representatives on the program under subsection (a).April 1, 2025

children.label: A
children.text: An identification of the military installations participating in the program under subsection (a).

children.label: B
children.text: The number of students enrolled in covered DODEA schools under the program.

children.heading: .—Notifications of Participating Installations
children.label: e .—Notifications of Participating Installations
children.text: Not later than 90 days before officially announcing the participation of a new military installation in the program under subsection (a), the Secretary shall notify the Committees on Armed Services of the Senate and the House of Representatives with respect to the participation of the installation.
was established on or before the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2025; and
is located in the continental United States.
